blended.narrative: Sunday River is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 44°F.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
